Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model using the pm4py format The dictionary must have specific keys

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the unary constraints existence absence exactly one init the value is a dictionary where keys are activities and values are tuples lists of support confidence Usually in pm4py it is a tuple support confidence Let us use 1 0 1 0

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the binary constraints the value is a dictionary where keys are tuples of activities activity A activity B and values are support confidence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Let us define the activities IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL Let us use the short names for simplicity

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let us construct a realistic DECLARE model for this process Process flow IG happens first IG must happen FL happens exactly once IG must be followed by DD DD must be followed by TFC and CE TFC and CE must precede PC PC must be followed by LT and UT LT and UT must precede AG AG must be followed by MP MP must be followed by FL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let us refine the constraints to make sure all keys are present in the dictionary even if empty

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let us populate them existence IG and FL exactly one FL and AG init IG responded existence IG DD and PC LT coexistence TFC CE and LT UT response IG DD DD TFC DD CE PC LT PC UT AG MP MP FL precedence TFC PC CE PC LT AG UT AG succession IG DD AG MP MP FL altresponse empty altprecedence empty altsuccession empty chainresponse AG MP and MP FL chainprecedence MP FL chainsuccession MP FL noncoexistence empty nonsuccession FL IG nonchainsuccession FL IG

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let us double check the prompt For binary the keys are a tuple of two activities which is the standard Pythonic way and pm4py actual implementation uses tuples for activity pairs

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Noncoexistence IG and FL would be wrong because IG and FL do coexist in the same trace Let us just use empty or make up Direct Launch

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Let us add an activity that should not happen for example DL meaning Direct Launch without testing

Name: Validation - PE
Text: One final check on the keys required All 18 keys are present The values for unary constraints are dicts with string keys The values for binary constraints are dicts with tuple keys All values are tuples of support confidence
